name: HR Agent
description: Handles HR queries: leave (balance, history, policy, apply, approve, reject) and cubicle assignments.

skills.name: Get leave policy
skills.description: Return the company leave policy: the available leave types and their rules (max days/year, notice period).

skills.name: Get leave balance
skills.description: Return the authenticated user's remaining leave balance (annual / sick / personal day counts).

skills.name: Get leave history
skills.description: Return the authenticated user's recent leave requests and their statuses.

skills.name: Apply for leave
skills.description: Submit a leave request for the authenticated user. Needs the leave type (one of: Annual Leave, Sick Leave, Personal Leave) and the start and end dates (YYYY-MM-DD); reason is optional.

skills.name: Approve leave request
skills.description: Approve a pending leave request by its id (HR Admin only). Needs leave_id.

skills.name: Reject leave request
skills.description: Reject a pending leave request by its id with a reason (HR Admin only). Needs leave_id and reason.

skills.name: Cubicle vacancy summary
skills.description: Return the per-floor count of total and vacant cubicles across all 4 floors (HR Admin).

skills.name: List vacant cubicles on a floor
skills.description: Return the list of vacant cubicle ids on a given floor (1-4) (HR Admin). Needs floor.

skills.name: Assign a cubicle to an employee
skills.description: Assign a cubicle to an employee (HR Admin, write). Needs cubicle_id and employee_username; employee_email optional.

skills.name: Get my cubicle
skills.description: Return the authenticated user's own cubicle assignment, if any.
